questions.text: Which of these is a greenhouse gas?
questions.explanation: Carbon dioxide (CO₂) is a greenhouse gas that traps heat in the atmosphere, contributing to global warming.

questions.text: Afforestation helps in reducing air pollution.
questions.explanation: Afforestation (planting trees) helps reduce air pollution as trees absorb CO₂ and release oxygen.

questions.text: What is the main cause of ozone layer depletion?
questions.correctAnswer: Release of CFCs (Chlorofluorocarbons) into the atmosphere.
questions.explanation: Ozone layer depletion is mainly caused by CFCs from refrigerators, air conditioners, and aerosol sprays.

questions.text: The layer of atmosphere that contains ozone is called ________.
questions.explanation: The ozone layer is located in the stratosphere, about 15-35 km above Earth's surface.
